issues.evidence: pnpm test:contract failed 51 historical contract tests whose final assertions compare the active git diff against their own legacy PR scopes. The current PR focused tests passed: tests/contracts/enneagram-public-profile-agent-pilot-01.contract.test.ts, tests/contracts/personality-agent-auto-runner-scheduler-01.contract.test.ts, tests/contracts/personality-agent-auto-runner-scheduler-activation-01.contract.test.ts. pnpm typecheck passed and git diff --check passed.
issues.why_not_current_pr_scope: Failures are scope-sentinel assertions in unrelated historical contract tests such as api gateway, help content, SEO issue queue, PR-WEB-SEC, and old SEO artifact scopes. They fail because this branch intentionally changes Enneagram agent artifact files and the shared personality runner, not because those unrelated contracts regressed.
issues.required_checks_affected: Local pnpm test:contract aggregate is affected; current scoped/focused contract checks are not affected. If GitHub required checks run full test:contract without a current-scope bypass, they may fail for the same external sentinel reason.
issues.recommended_follow_up: Create a separate contract-scope harness cleanup PR so historical scope-sentinel tests either use the active PR id/scope helper or are excluded from full-suite validation when unrelated PRs are under test.
